string.text:
A short barreled variant of the KS-12, itself a variant of the Saiga-12 semiautomatic shotgun, produced by Kalashnikov USA to work around the US ban on Russian guns. The weapon has a Picatinny rail for use with various types of sights, and includes a higher capacity magazine.
 This model has a new type of trigger mechanism, which allows you to fire a two rounds burst, and both a dovetail mount and Picatinny rail for use with various types of sights, and some modifications would allow to attach a grenade launcher. It has been provided to members of ISG research teams to protect themselves from mutants.
 %c[ui_gray_2]ATTACHMENTS:
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Scopes: All Red Dot scopes for Picatinny/weaver.
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Silencer: NATO suppressor
 %c[d_purple] • %c[0,255,255,255]Grenade Launcher: %c[ui_gray_2]GP25 (after upgrades)
 %c[ui_gray_2]COMPATIBLE MOD KITS:
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Custom weapon mod kit

A short barreled variant of the KS-12, itself a variant of the Saiga-12 semiautomatic shotgun, produced by Kalashnikov USA to work around the US ban on Russian guns. The weapon has a Picatinny rail for use with various types of sights, and includes a higher capacity magazine.
 This model has a new type of trigger mechanism, which allows you to fire a two rounds burst, and both a dovetail mount and Picatinny rail for use with various types of sights, and some modifications would allow to attach a grenade launcher. It has been provided to members of ISG research teams to protect themselves from mutants.
 Some dangerous lunatic got their hands on this gun and made it ready to attach a grenade launcher, and even load 23x75 rounds if one were to make some additional modifications.
 %c[ui_gray_2]ATTACHMENTS:
 %c[d_purple] • %c[0,255,255,255]Scopes: %c[ui_gray_2]All Red Dot scopes for Picatinny/Weaver 
 %c[d_purple] • %c[0,255,255,255]Silencer: %c[ui_gray_2]Salvo 12
 %c[d_purple] • %c[0,255,255,255]Grenade Launcher: %c[ui_gray_2]GP25
A complex, integrated alteration of the weapon's mechanical and automated parts, which allows its calibre to be changed at the cost of huge fire rate loss and increased recoil.
Modified Saiga-12S magazine with capacity for 8 shotshells. This magazine has been retooled for 23x75mm shotgun shells.
Extended Saiga-12S magazine with capacity for 12 shotshells. This magazine has been retooled for 23x75mm shotgun shells. More shells means more mutants you can kill each each magazine.
